product: New fields in lineage system table entity metadata
tagline: The entity metadata struct in the system.access.table lineage and system.access.column lineage system tables now includes genie space id and alert id fields.
what_it_does: The entity metadata struct in the system.access.table lineage and system.access.column lineage system tables now includes genie space id and alert id fields. The genie space id field is populated when the lineage record originates from a Genie space querying data, and alert id is populated when the lineage record originates from an alert query. For the full schema, see Entity metadata reference.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: Read-only: The source type is
capabilities.desc: Read-only: The source type is not null, but target type is null.

capabilities.title: Write-only: The target type is
capabilities.desc: Write-only: The target type is not null, but the source type is null.

capabilities.title: Read and write: The source
capabilities.desc: Read and write: The source type and the target type are not null.

key_takeaway: The entity metadata struct in the system.access.table lineage and system.access.column lineage system tables now includes genie space id and alert id fields.
